judge.key_evidence: wr_big 0.632 vs wr_small 0.583 (only ~5pt gap on n=7388/7387 — no size-conditional bifurcation); top3_share 0.212 (profit broadly distributed, not a-few-jackpots asymmetry); size_ratio 1.33 / med_win 1998 vs med_loss 1503 (no loss-dressing); flips=7 in 14,775 closes (F_decoy_flip score is statistical noise); max_gap_d 30.6 (no true dormancy). Profit concentration is in token @107 (maj:false), i.e. concentrated single-asset alpha, not deliberate copytrade camouflage.
judge.reasoning: A deception verdict requires BOTH an unnatural edge AND intentional noise to conceal it. Neither is present. The edge is mild and genuine: wr_big and wr_small are nearly equal (0.632 vs 0.583), ruling out Pattern A (size-conditional camouflage where big is high-WR and small is deliberately losing). top3_share of just 0.212 means profit is spread across thousands of trades, the opposite of Pattern B (low-WR-hidden-by-jackpots). size_ratio of 1.33 with med_loss $1503 vs med_win $1998 is textbook reasonable risk management, not Pattern D's unnaturally tiny dressed-up losses. F_decoy_flip scored 36.8 but there are only 7 flips across 14,775 closes — a near-zero base rate inflating a ratio, i.e. noise, not strategy. C_dormant_burst (3.6) and H_deliberate_dip (5.8) are low and max_gap is only ~30 days, so there is no genuine long-dormancy-then-catalyst pattern. The one notable feature is heavy profit concentration in token @107 (real_all $630k vs real_maj $183k; several top wins are exact 1:1 notional=pnl @107 Sells), which indicates concentrated alpha/early positioning in one specific HL-listed asset rather than a deliberate scheme to muddy a copytraded track record. That concentration is worth monitoring as a possible single-token information edge, but it does not exhibit the intentional-noise hallmark of deception. Overall: a high-volume, skilled, MM-like discretionary trader, not an insider deliberately obfuscating performance. Low deception_score.

judge.key_evidence: Timeline shows 2026-01 = 425W/17L (+$64.4k) and 2026-02 = 295W/0L (+$111.8k). A zero-loss month over 295 closes on BTC/ETH/SOL is not producible by skill, MM, or luck — the edge itself is unnatural (foreknowledge-grade). The Dec-2025 alt-coin loss cluster (MEW/2Z/ZETA, 218 small losses) plus size_ratio 2.68 / small med_loss act as a record-muddying layer (flags D=14.1, H=5.26), but that concealment leg is weaker/ambiguous (could be scale-out artifact + early alt phase).
judge.reasoning: Two-legged deception test: (1) unnatural edge — STRONGLY met. 425-17 then 295-0 win/loss records across hundreds of major-coin closes cannot arise from discretionary skill, market-making (which would show ~50% loss-by-count and small symmetric PnL), or variance. burst_share 0.573 and the dormant→burst pattern fit someone trading only on foreknown moves. top3_share 0.027 rules out the few-lucky-bets explanation. (2) deliberate concealing noise — PARTIALLY met but ambiguous. The D_controlled_loss=14.1 flag is largely explainable as a scale-out artifact (the 5x identical $5k ETH short clips show position-chunking that mechanically produces small closedPnl rows), and the Dec alt-loss cluster that drags WR down could be genuine early experimentation rather than intentional camouflage. So the concealment intent is plausible but not proven. Given the registry already marks this 'Former Smart Trader / 除外・低優先' (previously vetted and downgraded), I temper certainty. Score 0.55: the edge looks insider-grade and there is a credible record-muddying layer, but the 'deliberate noise' leg has innocent explanations (scaling, phase change), so it is suspicious-and-worth-flagging rather than a confirmed deception.

judge.key_evidence: med_loss_not=$167 (dust) vs med_win_not=$3204 forces size_ratio=19.2 and the runaway D_controlled_loss=112.5 purely as a scale-out fragmentation artifact; combined with low top3_share (0.243 = no lottery asymmetry), the top win being an involuntary Auto-Deleveraging fill, and a real 2026-05 blowup (0W/53L, -$11k) + demotion to 'Former Smart Trader' — none of which a concealment insider protecting an edge would produce.
judge.reasoning: The headline D_controlled_loss=112.5 looks alarming but is an artifact: a $167 median losing notional is not a 'deliberately small loss to dress the record' on a six-figure-PnL trader — it is dust from partial closes/scale-outs. The same fragmentation explains wr_big>>wr_small (A) since big scale-out tranches exit winners while tiny scraps exit red; a true size-conditional camouflage would make small trades look like real independent losing bets, not $167 fragments. The deception thesis also requires an UNEXPLAINABLE edge plus concealment, and every edge-anomaly test fails here: top3_share 0.243 means profit is broad (no low-WR/high-PnL asymmetry, B absent), wr_big 0.611 is good-not-impossible, and the single largest 'catalyst burst' win is dir=Auto-Deleveraging — an involuntary exchange liquidation fill, i.e. mechanics/luck, not catalyst foreknowledge (so C/burst_share 0.795 is inflated by one ADL event). flips=0 kills F. Decisively, the account does the one thing a concealment insider never does: it blows up (2026-05: 0 wins, 53 losing closes, -$11k) after grinding flat in 2026-04, and gets demoted to 'Former Smart Trader' / registry 除外・低優先. That is edge decay and regime mean-reversion of an ordinary discretionary scale trader, plus a one-off ADL windfall — not deliberate score-muddying to deter copytraders. Deception score kept low; primary = scaling_strategy with a side of regime_luck (the ADL fill).

judge.key_evidence: timeline が2レジームに截然分割: (1)2025-02〜07の高notional ($3k〜$42k) ほぼ全勝で$80k獲得、top_wins全てETH Close Short(2025-03〜04のETH急落を捕捉)+RESOLV short。(2)320日休眠後の2026-06は487W/654L・avg_not~$430・PnL=-471。つまり wr_big高/wr_small低・size_ratio2.12 は「大口=旧勝ち期、小口=新breakeven期」という温度差で、撹乱設計ではない。burst_share0.948 も休眠明けバーストが損失で終わっており、カタリスト的中で印刷するインサイダー像と矛盾。対象は流動性最高の majors(BTC/ETH/SOL)で micro-cap 前乗りなし、flips=0で囮反転もなし。
judge.reasoning: 欺瞞インサイダー認定には「優位自体が不自然」かつ「それを隠す意図的ノイズ」の併存が必要。本件はどちらも欠く。優位は2025年前半のETHショート方向性ベットに集中し、これはmajorsという最もインサイダー困難な銘柄で、しかもETH急落という実在のマクロ局面に乗っただけで実力/レジーム運で説明可能。パターンA/Cのスコアは「ほぼ全勝・無損失の2025勝ち期」と「高頻度・薄利・breakevenの2026グラインド期」を1つのドシエに連結したことで生じた統計的副産物にすぎない。決定的なのは、休眠明け(deceptionなら最大の見せ場)が利益でなく純損失(-471 over 1141 trades)であること——これは検知回避の化粧ではなく、単に旧エッジが薄れた後のスキャルピングが平行線をたどっているだけ。コピトレ撹乱の証拠(同時期の大口高勝率と小口意図的負けの共存、カタリスト直前の的中、低勝率を大当たりで補い続ける継続性)はいずれも不在。よって deception は低い。

refute.refute_reason: 欺瞞インサイダー像は「直近プロファイルを凡庸に偽装しつつ隠れたカタリスト・エッジを温存/micro-cap前乗り/囮flip/バーストで印刷」だが、本ウォレットは全て逆。(1)C_dormant_burst(4.648, burst_share0.948, max_gap319.9d)は真だが、休眠明け2026-06バースト(1141約定)はPnL=-471の損失で終了=カタリスト前乗りの逆。エッジは隠蔽されず、むしろ消失。(2)size-conditional(wr_big0.637/wr_small0.317, size_ratio2.12)は同一戦略内の「大勝ち/小負け」設計ではなく時系列レジーム分離のアーティファクト: big≈2025勝ち期(avg_not $3k〜$42k, 119W/11L, +$80.5k)、small≈2026-06凡庸期(avg_not$430, 487W/654L)。n_closes 1271=2025(130)+2026(1141)で整合。(3)top_winsは全てETH/RESOLV Close Shortで2025-03/04の実際の(公知の)ETH急落を捕捉=地合便乗の損小利大規律であり私的情報前乗りではない。(4)対象は流動性最高のmajors(BTC/ETH/SOL)のみ、micro-cap前乗りなし。(5)flips=0で囮反転なし。(6)2026-06の損失は全てZEC Close Short単日(06-17)の踏み上げ=エッジある者の挙動でない。(7)registry_position/quality/labels全null・lb_alltimeランク562737(低位)で隠れスマートマネー裏付けなし。良性説(地合便乗+スケールアウト規律+エッジ消失後の高頻度薄利)で全項目説明可能。deception_score0.12・regime_luckの第1判定は妥当。

judge.key_evidence: top_losses notionals (400127, 400115, 150023) EXCEED top_wins notionals (max 239988); the two biggest losses (-18783, -18782 on 2026-06-09) are larger than the biggest win (+12467). The largest-size bets LOST money — the opposite of controlled-loss camouflage. The high D=35/size_ratio is an artifact: a swarm of tiny scalp losses (med_loss 164) drags the loss median down while sized-up scalps form the win median. Plus a -33594 blowup month (2026-04, 16W/160L) and a barely-positive losing-record month (2026-05) are incompatible with a hidden insider with edge.
judge.reasoning: The dossier surfaces two deception-suggestive metrics — A_size_conditional (wr_big 0.66 vs wr_small 0.37) and a very high D_controlled_loss (35) with size_ratio 7.4 — but both dissolve under the per-trade evidence. (1) The biggest positions actually LOST: top losses (400k notional, -18.8k twice) exceed every top win (max 240k, +12.5k). A deception-insider hiding edge would not lose the most on max size; controlled-loss camouflage requires losers to be SMALL, here they are the largest. (2) The tiny median loss (164) reflects a high-frequency scalper scratching out micro losses while letting sized scalps run — a textbook benign 'cut losers small, size winners' scalping/MM mechanic, amplified by the artificial median split (n_big≈n_small). (3) Overall edge is a coin-flip (WR 51.4%) with a catastrophic -33.6k month (2026-04) and a losing-record month (2026-05); there is no catalyst-timed precision, no abnormal big-only edge that is inexplicable, no flips (F=0), and burst/top3 shares are unremarkable. (4) Single-coin BTC, ~23 closes/day = HF scalper/MM profile; PnL driven by one good June, not by a few suspicious catalyst hits. The registry already tags it 除外/低優先. The metrics are real but fully explained by good scalping discipline + the median-split artifact, not intentional camouflage of an insider edge. Deception score is low.

refute.refute_reason: 欺瞞インサイダー(controlled-loss camouflage)説は台帳内の事実で直接否定される。(1)最大サイズの建玉が損失: top_losses notional 400127/400115/150023 が top_wins 最大 239988 を上回り、全期間最大の2建玉(-18783/-18782, 2026-06-09)は最大勝ち(+12467)より大きい。インサイダーは確信時にサイズアップして勝つが、ここは逆=巨大建玉が破裂しており camouflage 機構と非整合。(2)size_ratio 7.4 / D=35 は中央値アーティファクト: med_loss_not 164 は微小スキャル損失の群れが損失中央値を押し下げた結果で、n_big 951/n_small 948 のほぼ完全50/50は自然な二峰分布でなく中央値カット。tail を見ると大サイズは負け側へ流入。(3)タイムライン非整合: 2026-04 は16勝160敗 pnl -33594 の壊滅月、2026-05 は220勝554敗の負け越し月。前方情報を持つインサイダーはこの戦績を出さない=MM/スキャルパーのDD。(4)wr_big>wr_small は MM/スキャル機構(大ロットが平均回帰好機に集中・resting quoteの逆選択)で説明可能で、インサイダー特有の損失tail署名へ転化していない。(5)flips=0・BTC単独・~23 closes/日・全top建玉が Close Short=単一銘柄高頻度ショートスキャル/MMプロファイル。イベント前方ポジショニング・銘柄横断・方向転換の痕跡なし。registry も既に「除外/低優先」と分類。良性説(MM薄利多売/中央値起因の見かけ損小利大/分割利確/散発投入/地合便乗)が表層署名を網羅的に説明し、最も致命的なのは「最大サイズが負けた」事実でこれは controlled-loss camouflage の真逆。残存疑念は wr_big 0.657 vs wr_small 0.371 のサイズ条件付き勝率差が大きく集計のみデータでサイズドエッジ成分を完全排除できない点のみで低い。

real_patterns: catalyst_concentrated_profit: 96% of lifetime PnL ($243k of $252k) made in just Nov+Dec 2024, with win/loss records of 9/0 then 133/4 (~97% WR) — not explainable by discretionary skill

single_asset_event_capture: all top wins are coin @107 'Sell', $14-15k notional, clustered late-Nov to 25-Dec 2024; the stated BTC/ETH/SOL/DOGE/BNB/ADA book is a separate, mediocre near-breakeven record (real_maj only $38k, wr 0.538)
loss_minimization (D/B-like): size_ratio 3.31, med_win 586 vs med_loss 177 — textbook small-loss/large-win, but on its own normal discipline
size_conditional (A=0.916): wr_big 0.638 vs wr_small 0.438, but the small book = Oct-2024 micro-spam (avg_not $39, 96W/234L) i.e. junk scalping, not a clean copy-trade decoy
dormancy/dip then new high (H=5.402, max_gap_d 111.8, burst_share 0.124): mediocre -> bad micro-spam dip -> explosive new high, but burst_share low and gap looks like genuine sporadic activity
judge.key_evidence: timeline 2024-12: win=133, loss=4, pnl=+$211,728 (preceded by 2024-11: win=9, loss=0, +$31,335) — a 133-4 month entirely on a single obscure token (@107, all 'Sell') accounts for ~96% of the $252,280 lifetime PnL, while every top_win is @107 and the majors/altcoin book is unremarkable and near-breakeven.
judge.reasoning: The EDGE itself is unnatural: a 133-4 month and a 9-0 month on a single obscure asset (@107) one-directional is not discretionary skill — it is event/structural-advantage capture (insider-grade), and it dwarfs an otherwise mediocre BTC/ETH/SOL/DOGE/BNB/ADA book (wr 0.538, real_maj only $38k). That satisfies the 'edge is unnatural' leg strongly. However, the DECEPTION label requires a second leg: deliberate noise engineered to HIDE that edge from copy-traders/detection. That leg is weak here. The winning @107 event is fully visible, uniformly large, and trivially copyable — there is no size-conditional muddying WITHIN the catalyst trades (the thing worth hiding). The 'noise' the flags fire on (A_size_conditional, H_deliberate_dip) is better explained mundanely: the small/low-WR book is genuine Oct-2024 micro-spam scalping (avg_not $39), and the dip-then-newhigh is sporadic attention plus a one-off bonanza rather than a manufactured launder (burst_share only 0.124, real 111.8-day gap). Small-loss/large-win (size_ratio 3.31) is textbook discipline, not by itself evidence. Net: high suspicion of insider/structural advantage on the @107 event, but low support for the *deliberate-obfuscation-for-copytrade-evasion* intent that the deception definition specifically demands — hence a moderate, below-0.5 deception score. I chose insider_camouflage as the closest bucket because the defining feature is an unexplainable single-event edge sitting atop an unrelated ordinary book; if forced to weight intent, the 'camouflage' half is largely absent and this is closer to opportunistic insider event-capture than to a deliberately濁された record.

refute.refute_reason: 良性説で第1判定の核を概ね説明可能。(1) @107 は Hyperliquid の「@n」=スポット・ペア指数表記であり、top_wins が全件 dir=Sell・$13.7k-15k の同規模クリップである点は「listing/airdrop で得た単一スポット銘柄の在庫を売り捌いた(=配分の現金化)」または「単一薄板スポットでのスプレッド取得型マーケットメイク」で自然に説明できる。133-4・WR~97%・med_win586/med_loss177・size_ratio3.31 はインサイダーの数発の大張り(N=少)ではなく、むしろ数百回の薄利多売(MM)/在庫処分のシグネチャに整合し、catalyst_concentrated_profit を必ずしも非裁量スキルと断定できない。(2) majors 帳簿は real_maj $38k・WR0.538 と凡庸で独立(ドシエも認める)=流動的市場での先見スキルの証拠なし。(3) size_conditional A=0.916 は wr_small が 2024-10 の avg_not$39 micro-spam(96W/234L)に汚染された計測アーティファクトで、コピートレード・デコイ説は不成立。(4) H_deliberate_dip=5.402/max_gap111.8d は burst_share0.124 と低く、散発的な実活動(2-6月 majors → gap → 10月 spam → @107 イベント)で説明でき、track-record 偽装の形ではない。(5) registry_position/quality/labels が全 null=台帳上インサイダー未分類・スマートマネー/インサイダーラベルなしで、プロジェクト収束結論(2026-06-18 個人インサイダー未検出)と整合。残る疑いは大口 Sell が 2024-11-29 と 12-23/24/25 の2窓に集中する点のみだが、薄板トークンが提供した数少ない流動性スパイクで在庫を抜くのは非インサイダーでも同形であり、しかも全て「出口(Sell)」で情報的エントリーのタイミング証拠(=インサイダー取引の本質)がゼロ。@107 の銘柄同定・カタリスト・エントリー履歴の裏取りも未取得(perp-trades は 403、on-chain footprint なし)。よって欺瞞でしか説明できない要素は確認できず反証成立。

real_patterns: scale-in / partial take-profit fragmentation: med_loss_not=1496 vs huge top-win/top-loss notionals (834k win, 517k loss) — small 'losses' are position-management fragments, not deliberately-sized decoy losers
single-month profit concentration then decay: ~all PnL earned in 2025-03 (+39,231), then +7,312 / -2,801 / -1,193 — regime/luck on the March 2025 BTC trend, not a persistent concealed edge
median-split artifact: n_big==n_small==891 (exact 50/50) means wr_big/wr_small reflect a self-median bucket split, mechanically inflating the apparent size-conditional gap
judge.key_evidence: Timeline shows essentially all profit in one month (2025-03 +39,231) followed by decay to losses (-2,801; -1,193) and a 367-day dormancy that returned losing — no durable edge to conceal. Auto-flag A relies on wr_big 0.613 vs wr_small 0.42, but n_big==n_small==891 (exact median split) and largest losses (517k) rival largest wins (834k), contradicting true controlled-loss deception. Corroborating deception signals absent: top3_share 0.233 (low, no lottery skew), burst_share 0.055 (dormancy returned losing, not catalyst-timed), overall WR 0.516 (ordinary), flips=0, single coin BTC.
judge.reasoning: Only one pattern auto-fired (A_size_conditional 0.9), and it is best explained as a statistical/structural artifact rather than intentional camouflage. The big/small buckets are an exact 50/50 median split of the trader's own closes, so a higher win rate on the larger half is the expected outcome of normal discretion (bigger conviction during a trend wins more) — not evidence of a hidden insider deliberately losing on small clips to disrupt copy-traders. Crucially, the deception thesis requires (1) an edge unexplainable by skill/luck AND (2) intentional noise to hide it. Neither holds: the win rate is mundane (0.516), there is no asymmetric lottery profit (top3_share only 0.233), no catalyst-timed dormant burst (burst_share 0.055, and the year-long gap returned losing), and the largest losses (517k notional) are the same order as the largest wins (834k), which directly refutes the 'losses unnaturally small' controlled-loss signature — the small med_loss_not=1496 simply reflects many tiny partial-close fragments from scaling in/out of one BTC position. The PnL story is a single strong month (March 2025, a BTC trend window) followed by decay into losses and disappearance. A concealing insider would maintain and hide a durable edge; this trader has no durable edge to hide. This is ordinary discretionary BTC trading whose results were dominated by a favorable regime, not deliberate score-muddying by an advantaged actor.

refute.refute_reason: 第1判定(deception_score 0.12 / regime_luck)を支持し、欺瞞インサイダー説を全面反証する。(1) 唯一の自動フラグ A_size_conditional=0.9 は n_big==n_small==891 の完全中央値分割による自己参照アーティファクト。中央値で二分すれば size と outcome に弱い相関がある任意のトレーダーで wr_big>wr_small の見かけ上のギャップが機械的に生じ、隠れたエッジの証拠にならない。(2) 損益額が勝ち額を上回る=反欺瞞シグネチャ:最大損失 PnL -5,128 は最大勝ち PnL +3,576 を超え、最大損失 notional 517k は最大勝ち 834k に匹敵。意図的損失抑制(controlled-loss deception)なら損失を系統的にキャップするはずで、事実は真逆。(3) 持続的エッジ不在:全 PnL の約92%が 2025-03 に集中(+39,231/総42,549)、以後 +7,312 → -2,801(5月は0勝67敗)→ -1,193 と一貫して損失へ減衰し 367日休眠後も負け再開。隠すべき durable edge が存在しない=2025年3月 BTC ラリーへの地合便乗/luck。(4) 小損失=スケールイン分割の断片:med_loss_not=1,496 対 med_win_not=10,000・top notional 834k、size_ratio 6.69 はトレンド乗り増し+部分利確/損切りの position-management 断片であり、意図的に小さく設計した囮の負けではない。(5) 補強シグナル全欠如:top3_share 0.233(低・宝くじ的偏り無)、burst_share 0.055(極低・カタリスト同期エントリー無で、インサイダーなら逆に高いはず)、overall WR 0.516(凡庸なコインフリップ)、flips=0、単一コイン BTC・Long-only(Close Long のみ)。情報優位ではなく単純なディレクショナル・ベータ捕捉。(6) registry_position=null で既存の確定インサイダー分類も無し。欺瞞でしか説明できない要素は皆無で、残る生の wr_big/wr_small ギャップも中央値分割で機械的に膨らんだ独立裏付けの無い単独指標にすぎない。

judge.reasoning:
この口座の利益は「優位を隠す意図的ノイズ」ではなく、単一のpre-IPO/ベンチャー系商品(vntl:ANTHROPIC)のSettlement(満期決済)一発に全面依存している。

(2) B_asymmetric/top3_share=1.004の正体: 低勝率(0.423)を『多数の散発的大当たり』で濁しているのではなく、ANTHROPIC settlement という1イベントが益のほぼ全て。コピトレ撹乱なら「大口は当てる/小口はわざと負ける」分離が要るが、ここは小口グラインド(2025-10/11)は概ねトントン〜微益で、わざと負けて記録を濁す形跡なし。むしろ2025-12は本気で-$72k溶かしている。

(3) H_deliberate_dip: フラグ値5.742は高いが、12月の0勝154敗・avg_not $1,846は『勝ち逃げ後にわざと小さく負けて濁す』ではなく、規模を縮小しながら出した本物の連敗(実損)。意図的dipなら損失を小さく抑えるはずが$72k+の実害が出ている。

(4) 真の論点はANTHROPIC settlementが『インサイダー的中』か: dir=Settlementは満期決済であり、カタリスト直前の方向当て(Cの48h集中)ではない。burst_share 0.1 と低く、休眠明け48hに益が集中していない。pre-IPO/ベンチャー商品のロングを満期まで保有して当たった=方向観の勝利(レジーム/運+確信ベット)であり、HL公開データ上は『実力/運で説明不能な非対称』とは言い切れない。

(5) コピトレ対策の動機との不整合: 検知回避欺瞞なら高勝率エッジを隠す必要があるが、この口座はそもそも勝率0.423と低く、隠すべき継続的エッジが見えない。益は構造的優位ではなく一発の確信ベットに帰属する。

総合: 損小利大・休眠・非対称はすべて『一発の大型確信ベット+その前の地道グラインドと実損ドローダウン』で説明でき、優位を隠す意図的ノイズの併存は確認できない。deception_scoreは低い。唯一の留保はANTHROPIC建玉のエントリー時期が非公開材料に先行していたか(インサイダー)だが、settlement型・burst非集中・大口高勝率なし、から欺瞞カモフラージュとしては成立しない。」

ADL_not_skill: top wins are dir='Auto-Deleveraging' = exchange force-closed winning positions into a counterparty-liquidation cascade; profit realized by the risk engine, not by trader timing/catalyst front-running
alt_concentration: windfall is in altcoins (FARTCOIN/XPL/MON), not the BTC/ETH/SOL majors; real_maj only 63,913 = modest major-coin edge

genuine_large_losses: top_losses are big (ETH -12,317 / -11,428, BTC -6,178 on 90-100k notional) and direction-correct losses — losses are NOT cosmetically tiny, contradicting D_controlled_loss disguise
real_losing_streaks: 2025-05 = 0 win / 261 loss / -39,988; 2024-03 -36,689; 2025-07 -28,500; 2025-11 45 win / 568 loss — sustained genuine bleed inconsistent with a hidden edge
mediocre_wr_big: wr_big 0.557 is only modestly above wr_small 0.32 and far from insider-grade (~0.85+); consistent with normal conviction-sizing, not anomalous big-order accuracy

judge.key_evidence: 73% of all profit (top3_share 0.728) and ~71% of lifetime PnL (2025-10 month +528,584) come from two 'Auto-Deleveraging' wins both dated 2025-10-10 (FARTCOIN +411,011, XPL +116,749) — force-closures by the exchange risk engine during the Oct-10-2025 liquidation cascade, in altcoins not majors. burst_share 0.959 simply re-encodes this one ADL crash event, not a front-run catalyst.
judge.reasoning: For deliberate deception there must be (1) an edge too good to be honest and (2) intentional noise hiding it. Neither holds. (1) No hidden edge: wr_big is only 0.557 (mediocre, not insider-grade), major-coin PnL is just 63.9k, and the trader posts repeated genuine catastrophic losing months (2025-05: 0 wins/261 losses/-40k; 2024-03 -37k; 2025-07 -28.5k; 2025-11 568 losses). The 742k lifetime figure is overwhelmingly one event: two Auto-Deleveraging wins on 2025-10-10. ADL means the position was force-liquidated FOR the trader by Hyperliquid's risk engine when counterparties blew up in the Oct-2025 cascade — pure positioning luck during a market regime break, not skilled catalyst timing or front-running. (2) The 'muddying' signals are artifacts: D_controlled_loss is high by formula (size_ratio 2.57) but actual top losses are large and direction-correct (ETH -12k, BTC -6k on ~100k notional), so losses are NOT disguised; the tiny median loss reflects many small scratch trades among 3745 closes. C/burst just re-describes the single ADL day; max gaps look like sporadic funds/attention. wr_big>wr_small is ordinary conviction sizing. This profile is a mediocre/variance-driven discretionary retail trader who got one massive lucky ADL windfall during the Oct-10-2025 crash — not an insider intentionally degrading a real edge to evade copy-traders. deception_score very low.

refute.refute_reason: 第1判定(deception_score=0.08, regime_luck)を支持し反証成立。決定的根拠は欺瞞でしか説明できない要素が存在しないこと。(1)生涯PnLの~71%(2025-10 +528,584)とtop3_share 0.728は2025-10-10の2件のAuto-Deleveraging勝ち(FARTCOIN +411k, XPL +116k)に集中。ADLは取引所リスクエンジンによる強制クローズで、トレーダーが時機もエグジットも選べない=触媒の先行(front-run)とは機構的に正反対。Oct-10-2025の全市場清算カスケード時の地合便乗・棚ぼたであり、利益は取引所が実現させたもの。burst_share 0.959/C_dormant_burst 5.63はこの単一イベントを再エンコードしただけで反復的dormant-strikeサイクルではない。(2)D_controlled_loss 12.35は高いがtop_lossesが本物で大きい(ETH -12,317/-11,428 on ~90-96k notional, BTC -6,178 on 100k, 全て方向整合のClose Short損)=偽装的微小損ではなく、Dスコアはmed_loss_not 242(3745クローズ中の多数の薄利/分割スクラッチ)のアーティファクト。(3)持続的な実損ストリーク多数(2025-05: 0勝/261敗/-39,988、2024-03 -36,689、2025-07 -28,500、2025-08 5勝/105敗、2025-11 45勝/568敗、2025-12 -10,184)は隠れたエッジと矛盾。(4)wr_big 0.557 vs wr_small 0.32は僅差でインサイダー級(~0.85+)に遠く、全体win_rate 0.439は凡庸。conviction-sizingで説明可。(5)windfallは全てアルト(FARTCOIN/XPL/MON)、real_maj 63,913のみでメジャー情報エッジは無し。MM的薄利多売(2025-01 597勝/avg_not 2220、2025-03等の高頻度小ロット)+規律無き出血+ADL棚ぼたで全プロファイル説明可。registry_position/quality/labels全null=台帳もインサイダー未分類で裏付け無し。残存疑い0.07は2025-03の85勝/2敗の片寄りと一部月のavg_not突出(episodic大口投入)のみだが、いずれも2025-12が大notで-10,184を出している通り一貫した大口エッジを欠き、インサイダー情報を要しない。

Net real_all 293,599 is essentially one month (Feb +830k, driven by Feb 5 crash-day BTC/ETH shorts) net against Dec -570k and Apr/May losses. C_dormant_burst 6.441 / H_deliberate_dip 5.468 are false positives: max_gap_d only 18.3d in an always-on account, so the 'burst' is just Feb 5 PnL lumpiness, not dormancy-then-catalyst.
judge.reasoning: For deliberate deception by an edge-holder we need an unnatural edge PLUS intentional noise hiding it. Both are absent. The edge is not unnatural: overall win_rate 0.246 is low, and critically the big orders win LESS (0.214) than small (0.277) and winning notionals are SMALLER than losing notionals (size_ratio 0.6) — the exact opposite of A (size-conditional) and D (controlled-loss) camouflage. No flips (F=0). Profit is not a hidden, protected, catalyst-timed edge: it is one crash day (2026-02-05 shorts) that dominates lifetime PnL (top3_share 1.339), bracketed by a -570k Dec and a multi-month Apr/May bleed — i.e. lumpy directional beta / regime luck inside a high-frequency mean-reversion or MM book on the most liquid majors (~347 closes/day). The high C/H pattern scores are detector artifacts of single-day PnL concentration in an always-on account (max_gap_d 18.3d, no true dormancy), not deliberate record-muddying by someone with an advantage. lb_alltime rank ~1.35M and null registry/quality/labels further argue against a tracked insider. Good-discipline confounders here actually point AWAY from deception. Deception score very low.

judge.reasoning: A deception-insider hides a genuine clean edge under deliberate noise. The discriminating tests all come back negative here: big and small positions have identical win rates (no camouflaged 'real book'), winners and losers are the same notional size (no loss-shrinking cosmetics), and there are zero decoy flips. Crucially the trader is a NET LOSER on the majors (BTC/ETH, -381k) — an insider with edge does not bleed on the most liquid watched pairs. The entire net lifetime profit (top3_share 0.999) is three TAO Close-Long fills on one day in the late-April 2025 alt run, surrounded by enormous symmetric two-way variance (multiple ±$1M months). The C/H flags are explainable benignly: max_gap 213d is a real dormant→funded transition, but burst_share is only 2.84 (profit did NOT cluster in the 48h post-wake window; the big money came months later in April), and H's dip-then-new-high is just the natural shape of a volatile momentum gambler giving back and reclaiming. There is no clean edge to hide and no concealment structure — this is concentrated luck during a favorable alt regime, not engineered deception. deception_score very low.

Strip these and real_maj (BTC/ETH/SOL perps) is only $36,802 over 799 days/3175 closes. Perp win_rate 19.2%, wr_big 25.6% (no big-order edge), flips=0, plus real uncamouflaged losses: 2025-06 226W/1969L and 2026-02 -$57,193 COPPER blowup.
judge.reasoning: Deception requires (1) an unnatural edge and (2) deliberate noise hiding it. Here there is NO hidden perp edge to conceal: overall win rate 19.2%, big-order win rate 25.6% (both terrible), no size-conditional A pattern (big WR is not high), flips=0 (no decoy F), and the wallet takes genuine large losses (-$57k COPPER 2026-02, 1969 losses in 2025-06) that no loss-dressing deceiver would post. The headline $585k PnL is almost entirely from coin @107 Sell trades where pnl==notional — i.e., a zero-cost spot/airdrop allocation liquidated, which is openly the largest PnL line (the opposite of concealment). The B_asymmetric/C_dormant_burst/size_ratio flags are all downstream artifacts of (a) that spot dump and (b) high-frequency scale-in micro-closes producing tiny median losses. real_maj of just $36,802 over 799 days confirms the perp activity is mediocre, not insider-grade. Verdict: mediocre/high-churn discretionary trader with a lucky free-token windfall, not deceptive insider camouflage.

judge.reasoning: This is not deliberate deception by an edge-holder. The lifetime profit is one Hyperliquid Auto-Deleveraging windfall in the illiquid 'S' token during the Oct-10-2025 cascade (PnL 280,884), which alone exceeds total realized PnL (270,691); top3_share 1.082 confirms the remaining book nets negative and real_maj -1072 shows the trader actually loses on ETH/SOL. The two deception patterns that require intent and an underlying edge both point the wrong way: wr_big (0.281) is LOWER than wr_small (0.364), the inverse of A/insider size-camouflage, and size_ratio 0.85 with med_loss_not (1102) > med_win_not (935) is the inverse of D/controlled-loss cosmetics — losses are genuinely larger than wins, not dressed down. judge.reasoning: This is the OPPOSITE of a camouflaged insider. A deceptive insider hides a real edge behind noise; here there is no hidden edge to hide. The majors (BTC/ETH) realized PnL is -247k — the trader is a net LOSER on the very coins they trade, with the headline +69k net only surviving because of lumpy outliers. The single biggest contributor to 'wins' are Auto-Deleveraging events (FARTCOIN/PUMP) which are exchange-forced liquidations of others' positions against this account's side — pure mechanical/luck windfalls, not catalyst-timed precision. The catastrophic May-2025 month (-476,460 across 47 losses, all large BTC Close Shorts during a squeeze) is exactly what an insider with information would NOT do; it shows undisciplined oversized directional conviction that was simply wrong. wr_big (0.561) is only modestly above coinflip and well within normal swing-trader range; the size_ratio 3.69 / small median loss reflects ordinary scale-in/partial-take-profit closes (many months show 'win 41/loss 0' = fragmented winning exits), not D_controlled_loss cosmetics — note when they're wrong the losses are GIGANTIC (450k notional), the inverse of D. Only C fired, and dormant→burst here is consistent with intermittent capital deployment and high-variance directional bets on BTC/ETH, not insider catalyst timing. No A (wr_big not anomalous), no B with a genuine edge (the asymmetry is driven by ADL luck and offset by a -476k bust, net is barely positive), no F (flips=0). Verdict: a high-variance, occasionally over-leveraged discretionary trend trader who got rescued by exchange ADL windfalls and nearly ruined by a wrong BTC short — not deliberate result-muddying by an advantaged actor. deception_score kept very low.

Blow-up-then-recovery arc: 2024-12 (0W/22L, -36.9k) + 2025-01 (0W/138L, -97.9k) catastrophe, ~313d dormancy, then a single clean 2025-11 month (29W/0L, +95.6k)
D_controlled_loss flag is a statistical artifact: size_ratio=11.36 / med_loss_not=764 is dragged down by 138 tiny Jan losses (avg_not 3,319), NOT deliberately small stops
Actual biggest losses are huge, not small: HYPE -31,098 on 137k notional, ETH -25,934 on 168k notional -- contradicts the 'losses kept small to cosmeticize' premise
wr_big=0.242 is higher than wr_small=0.064 but still SUB-coinflip and net-losing -- no anomalous big-trade edge to hide
All 5 top wins are ETH 'Close Short' on a single day (2025-11-18): one good directional move in a drop, not multi-event catalyst precision
top3_share=0, burst_share=0, flips=0: patterns B/C/F are not actually evidenced; only D fired and it is mechanical
judge.key_evidence: Trader is net NEGATIVE (-39,248) with 15.3% win rate and 160 consecutive losses (0 wins) across Dec-2024/Jan-2025 before a single recovery month. A deception-insider disguises a POSITIVE hidden edge; here wr_big=24% is itself losing and the biggest losses (137k-168k notional, -25k to -31k) are large, not small -- so D_controlled_loss is a survivorship artifact of a fat tail of tiny Jan losses, not intentional loss-cosmetics.
judge.reasoning: The single fired pattern is D_controlled_loss (size_ratio 11.36; med_win 8,680 vs med_loss 764). Per the brief, loss-small/win-big is only evidence when paired with an unexplained edge being hidden. Three facts kill the deception thesis: (1) the account is net-negative (-39,248), so there is no edge to conceal -- a copy-trade-disrupting insider would be net-positive while looking mediocre; (2) wr_big=0.242 is higher than wr_small=0.064 but is still a losing rate, i.e. no anomalous large-order win rate; (3) the real losses are NOT uniformly small -- top_losses show -31,098 (137k notional) and -25,934 (168k notional). The low med_loss_not is explained entirely by 138 micro-losses in 2025-01 (avg_not 3,319) following the Dec-2024 blowup -- a classic revenge/over-trading blow-up signature, the opposite of disciplined loss-disguise. The timeline (22L, 138L, then 29W/0L after 313-day gap) reads as a retail trader who got liquidated, went away, and caught one good ETH short cluster on 2025-11-18. No MM signature (low frequency, large median notionals, majors only), no catalyst-precision (wins are one day, one direction), top3_share/burst_share/flips all zero. Conclusion: ordinary losing discretionary trader; the D flag is a mechanical false positive. deception_score=0.07.

real_patterns: B_asymmetric (genuine, benign form): WR 27.5% but top3_share 0.444 and 3 months (2024-11 +121k, 2024-12 +271k, 2025-06 +406k) hold essentially 100% of the 796k lifetime PnL; all five top wins are @107 shorts.

judge.key_evidence: All realized profit traces to @107 Sell positions in 3 windows; majors net only 56k/796k; no size-conditional WR gap and no cosmetically-small losses to indicate concealment.
judge.reasoning: Deception by an advantaged insider requires BOTH an unnatural hidden edge AND deliberate noise that conceals it. Neither concealment signature is present here. Pattern A (the strongest copy-trade-muddying tell) is absent: big and small trades have near-identical win rates (0.271 vs 0.279) and identical sizing (size_ratio 0.97) — a sandbagger would show wr_big >> wr_small with deliberately small losers, but losses here are actually marginally LARGER than wins, so Pattern D is also absent. Pattern C (dormant-burst) is absent: burst_share 0.059 and max_gap 25.4d, the wallet trades every single month for 881 days with no catalyst-timed awakenings before its big months. F_decoy_flip scores 71 but flips=15 over 18,368 closes is statistically negligible — a scoring artifact, not systematic decoy behavior. What IS real is Pattern B asymmetry: a low 27.5% win rate carried entirely by a few monster @107 shorts (top3_share 0.444; three months ~= all lifetime PnL). But the prompt explicitly flags B as the benign kind — a handful of high-conviction directional bets and textbook let-winners-run, which is NOT by itself evidence of deception. The ~18k tiny ~$1k symmetric majority trades on majors look like high-frequency churn that is roughly breakeven-to-losing, not engineered camouflage. Profile = a high-frequency discretionary trader whose entire edge is a concentrated @107 short thesis that paid off in 2024-11/12 and 2025-06; mediocre and symmetric everywhere else. Score kept off the floor only because genuine B-asymmetry exists and the @107 concentration in one obscure instrument warrants light monitoring, but there is no corroborating intentional-noise signature to call this deliberate deception.

Size-conditional (A): wr_big 0.747 < wr_small 0.785, so big positions WIN LESS than small ones — the opposite of co-trade camouflage; n_big=n_small=6867 is just a median split. Controlled-loss (D): size_ratio 0.77, med_win_not 489 < med_loss_not 635 — winners are SMALLER than losers, the inverse of loss-dressing; losses are not unnaturally tidy. Asymmetric (B): win_rate is high (0.766) and top3_share only 0.284 — not a low-WR/high-PnL profile. Dormant-burst (C): burst_share 0.031 ~ zero. Decoy-flip (F): flips=0. The only flag, H_deliberate_dip 7.158, fires on the shape (huge Oct spike then decline) but there is NO new high afterward — June 2026 is a genuine drawdown (934 win / 1204 loss, -$294K), i.e. real performance degradation, not a manufactured dip to refresh a record. The entire 'edge' is concentrated in the 2025-10-10 liquidation cascade captured via Auto-Deleveraging (not a discretionary or catalyst-timed entry), which is a market-regime/crash windfall rather than insider foreknowledge. No concealing noise structure co-exists with an unnatural edge, so this fails the conjunction required to call it deceptive insider camouflage.

Top wins are tiny (1% of total) and reactive to the 2026-03-16 move, not catalyst-precise.
judge.reasoning: The two raised flags (C_dormant_burst 6.63, H_deliberate_dip 7.05) are mechanical artifacts of a high-frequency churn strategy, not deliberate noise hiding an insider edge. For deception we require BOTH an unnatural edge AND intentional noise concealing it; here neither holds. (1) No unnatural edge: big-order win rate is only 0.693 (mediocre), and profit is maximally diffuse (top3 wins = 2.7% of total), the opposite of an asymmetric/catalyst-precise insider. (2) No concealment signature: wr_small (0.829) exceeds wr_big (0.693), which is the inverse of size-conditional copytrade disruption; and wins are SMALLER than losses (size_ratio 0.3, med_win 301 vs med_loss 1000), the inverse of controlled-loss cosmetics. The profile — thousands of tiny closes on BTC/ETH, very high win rate, small wins offset by occasional larger losses, profit spread across the whole distribution, flips=0 — is the textbook signature of a market-maker / mean-reversion scalper providing liquidity. The 'burst'/'dip' come from monthly PnL oscillation (pure-win months vs one -1.47M April drawdown) inherent to such churn, and the top BTC short wins on 2026-03-16 are reactive to a market-wide move (same-day same-side ETH shorts actually LOST), not pre-catalyst foreknowledge. This is a skilled/automated HFT-MM operator, not a deception insider.

judge.key_evidence: Single token @107, all Sell, flips=0; two dormancy-burst 0-loss months (2025-06 30W/0L +$121k; 2025-08 4W/0L +$231k at 10x size $127.5k avg_not) then post-peak noise (2025-12 391 trades +$156; 2026-02 0W/102L -$25k). C=7.067, H=5.461, top3_share=0.861, burst_share=1.294. But A fails (wr_big 0.441 vs wr_small 0.37, both mediocre) and D fails (size_ratio 1.15, med_win 2125 vs med_loss 1851 symmetric).
judge.reasoning: Suspicious but underdetermined. SUPPORTS deception: bursty edge localized to two short campaigns on a single token after long dormancy, each a perfect-win month with 10x size scaling, followed by a high-volume flat/losing noise period at tiny size — the dormant-burst (C) + deliberate-dip (H) combination plus extreme profit concentration (top3=86%) is the informed-short-then-obfuscate profile. NOT a market maker (flips=0, one-directional, no two-sided薄利多売). AGAINST clean deception: the two cleanest camouflage tells FAIL — A (size-conditional) is absent: wr_big=0.441 is only ~7pp above wr_small=0.37 and is itself mediocre (no異常高勝率 on large size); D (controlled loss) is absent: size_ratio=1.15 and med_win 2125 vs med_loss 1851 are nearly symmetric, and 2024-12 losses were large (~$70k notional), not化粧された small losses. The 0-loss months are mechanically explainable as staggered exits of one large short (multiple @107 sells on the same dates 2025-06-10 / 2025-08-27), which inflates win counts without implying surgical per-trade selection. Overall WR is low (40.5%) and there are genuine losing periods, weakening the 'unnatural edge concealed by deliberate noise' thesis. Net: leading hypothesis is informed/insider directional short on @107 with bursty timing and post-peak muddying, but lacking the size-conditional/controlled-loss signature needed to confirm intentional copytrade-disruption — hence moderate, not high, score.

refute.refute_reason: 良性説で全データを説明可能。(1) 診断自身が中核2基準を否定: A不成立(wr_big 0.441≒wr_small 0.37、大張りに優位なし)・D不成立(size_ratio 1.15、med_win 2125 vs med_loss 1851で対称)。情報トレーダーなら確信時に大きく張り大張りで偏って勝つはずだが、サイズ対称・優位凡庸。(2) 単一銘柄@107・全Sell・flips=0は「特定銘柄への一方向(ショート)構造的確信」=ヘッジャー/弱気テーゼ保有者の典型で、ニュース毎にトグルする挙動と逆。(3) 2つの0損月(2025-06/08)は単一銘柄の持続的下落トレンドを一貫ショートで乗っただけで説明可能(連勝0損はトレンド追随の自然な帰結)。(4) 欺瞞インサイダー説に致命的: 2024-12 -$37.8k と 2026-02 0W/102L -$25k の本物の負け月が2回存在。情報保有者は0勝102敗の月を食わない=トレンド反転で普通に損切りした方向性トレーダーの姿。(5) 唯一怪しい2025-08の10倍サイズ($127.5k)は全て同日2025-08-27クラスタの4約定で、top_winsが$367k→$86k→$50kと逓減=ラダー分割利確(良性MM/クジラ挙動)であり、多数ポジに跨る協調的情報イベントではない。(6) top3_share 0.861・burst_share 1.294は集中型方向性ベッターなら当然の利益集中で固有指標ではない。(7) deception_score 0.42は確信閾値未満、registry_position=nullで台帳上も未分類。総じて「@107への弱気確信で持続下落を一貫ショート→大移動日に分割エントリ→反転局面で吐き出した集中方向性トレーダー」が全事実を説明する。残存疑い: マイナーHL銘柄での単一銘柄単一方向2清浄月はプロジェクト関係者ショートの可能性を完全には消せず0.28残す。

judge.key_evidence: 欺瞞シグネチャが軒並み反転: wr_big(0.514) < wr_small(0.58)、size_ratio=0.66で負け>勝ち、HYPEの実際の強制清算(-254k)とZEC -278kの生の大損、-815k等の壊滅的月、勝率0.547は正常。エッジが不自然でもなく、それを隠すノイズもない。
judge.reasoning: このウォレットは「優位を隠す欺瞞インサイダー」の判定基準を一つも満たさない。判定核となる非対称性が全て逆向きである。(1) A_size_conditionalは大口高勝率・小口故意敗北を要するが、実データは大口の方が低勝率(0.514<0.58)。(2) D_controlled_loss/損小利大を要するが、size_ratio=0.66で勝ち建玉中央値(1666)が負け建玉中央値(2539)より小さく、むしろ損大利小=averaging-downの悪癖。(3) top_lossesにHYPEのLiquidated Cross Long(-254k)という実際の強制清算とZEC -278kの生の巨額損失があり、最大勝ち(70k)を遥かに上回る。損失は化粧されておらず、むしろ無防備。(4) 月次でも-815k(2025-11)、-355k、-297kといった破滅的DDを繰り返し、真のインサイダー優位とは矛盾。(5) win_rate=0.547は健全な正で、低勝率を数発で濁すB型でもない。(6) n_closes=26350・872日で日30約定の高頻度、BTC/ETH/SOL主体、real_maj(85k)<real_all(302k)で利益はむしろalt由来=degen的投機。F_decoy_flip=19.7やC_dormant_burst=12.9のスコアはflips=4・max_gap=21.9日(長期休眠なし)という実態から、高頻度スケールイン/アウトの機械的アーティファクトに過ぎない。総合すると、これは高頻度・高分散で辛うじてネット黒字の普通の活発トレーダーであり、インサイダー優位もそれを隠す意図的ノイズも認められない。deception_scoreは極めて低い。

refute.refute_reason: 欺瞞シグネチャが軒並み「弱い」のではなく能動的に反転しており、良性説で全面説明可能。(1) A_size_conditionalの逆: wr_big 0.514 < wr_small 0.58、大口ほど低勝率=市場インパクト/スリッページに整合し、コピトレ撹乱(小を負け化し大で勝つ)とは正反対。(2) D_controlled_lossの逆: size_ratio 0.66, med_win 1666 < med_loss 2539=勝ち建玉が負け建玉より小さい=勝ち逃げ早すぎ・負け持ち越し/ナンピンという人間的な悪いリスク管理であり、化粧された揃った小損とは真逆。(3) 生の壊滅損失と強制清算: HYPE Liquidated Cross Long -254k(エッジ保持者が被るはずのないクロス強制清算)、ZEC -278k、ETH -76k。最大級のP&LイベントはことごとくLOSSであり、カタリスト先行で非対称益を取るB_asymmetric/インサイダー像の真逆。(4) F_decoy_flip 19.718はflips=4のみ→26350約定/872日(~30/日)の高頻度churnの機械的副産物。(5) C_dormant_burst 12.901もmax_gap_d 21.9で長期休眠なし→hibernation→覚醒の前提を満たさず、intraday burst clusteringの artifact。(6) 月次は+334k/+248k vs -815k(1724勝/2367敗の majority-losing blowup)/-355k/-297kと両方向に破滅的振れ→真のエッジでは不可能。2025-07/09でavg_not 34987/41006へ急拡大=負け局面でのサイズ増=revenge/averaging。(7) win_rate 0.547は健全な正で低勝率大当たり型でなく、top3_share 0.438も中程度。(8) registry_position/quality/labels すべてnullで既存のインサイダー/スマートマネー裏付けなし。結論: 高頻度の裁量/MM的churn+規律の悪い損切りで全シグネチャが説明され、欺瞞でしか説明できない要素は残らない。

judge.key_evidence: wr_big=0.427 < wr_small=0.47 (big positions win LESS, opposite of insider camouflage); size_ratio=0.76 with med_win_not 751 < med_loss_not 986 (losers BIGGER than winners, opposite of controlled-loss cosmetics); real_maj=-4576 (net NEGATIVE on BTC/ETH/SOL — no edge on tradeable majors); top3_share=0.601 with all top wins on non-major @107 Sells clustered 2024-11-30..2024-12-20; flips=0; perfect months 2024-11 (60W/0L,+105k) & 2024-12 (61W/0L,+103k) = one-time @107 windfall, then 254d gap and -178k in 2025-10.
judge.reasoning: The deception thesis needs both an unnatural persistent edge AND intentional noise hiding it. Neither holds. (1) No size-conditional camouflage: big-size win rate (0.427) is LOWER than small-size (0.47) — the inverse of the A pattern an insider running cover trades would produce. (2) No controlled-loss cosmetics (D): winners' median notional (751) is smaller than losers' (986), size_ratio 0.76 — losses are bigger than wins, the opposite of dressed-up losses. (3) No hidden edge on majors: real_maj is -4576, i.e., the trader actually LOSES on BTC/ETH/SOL. All profit (185k) comes from non-major coin @107 via a handful of Sell closes over ~3 weeks in late 2024 (top3_share 0.60). That is a single regime/windfall, not repeatable catalyst-front-running. (4) The C/H flags (dormant_burst 7.25, deliberate_dip 5.27, burst_share 1.38, max_gap 254d) are mechanically driven by that one windfall spike followed by a long dormancy and then large 2025-10/2025-12/2026-01 drawdowns — a 'got lucky once then bled' profile, not deliberately injected noise around a live edge. (5) flips=0 rules out decoy-flip; B_asymmetric is low (0.111). High n_closes (7729) over 883 days with sub-50% win rate and net-negative majors reads as an active discretionary/grinder who caught one big non-major move, not an insider obfuscating copytrade signal. Deception score kept very low; good-discipline patterns are explicitly discounted and here even those aren't present (losses exceed wins).

refute.refute_reason: 欺瞞インサイダーの全シグネチャが欠如または反転している。(1) real_maj=-4576: 実際にトレード可能なメジャー(BTC/ETH/SOL)で純損失=エッジ皆無。インサイダーなら正であるべき。(2) wr_big=0.427 < wr_small=0.47: 大ポジの方が勝率が低い=高確度のインサイド情報でサイズアップする偽装と正反対。(3) med_win_not=751 < med_loss_not=986 かつ size_ratio=0.76: 負けの方が大きい=「損を化粧で小さく見せる controlled-loss cosmetics」と正反対。実際にBTCメジャーで-9424×2(378k notional)の無加工な実損を被っている。(4) flips=0: 前裁き的な方向反転なし。(5) C_dormant_burst(7.253)の実体は2024-11/12の@107(非メジャーHLトークン)Sell集中の一回限りwindfall(60W/0L+61W/0L)。avg_notが極小(2349/1979)=単一勝ちポジの分割利確スケールアウト=「薄利多売・地合便乗・分割利確」で完全説明可。catalyst-timedな精度はメジャーに存在せず。(6) その後254日休眠→-178k(2025-10)/-85k(2025-12)/-27k(2026-01)の大ドローダウン=H_deliberate_dipの実体は本物の損失であり、持続エッジを隠す cosmetic dip ではない。全体 win_rate=0.449(<50%)、n_closes=7729の高頻度churnでMM/スキャルパー型プロファイル。registry_position/quality/labels すべてnull(既存分類で smart-money/insider ラベルなし)。台帳の「先行はN=1常習」debunkロジックが本件@107一回限りバーストにそのまま適用される。regime_luck + 高頻度churn であり、隠されたエッジではない。

judge.key_evidence: Lifetime profit (real_all 286,619; top3_share 0.616) is dominated by two non-repeatable, non-insider events: (1) the #1 win is HYPE dir="Auto-Deleveraging" +121,684 on 2025-10-10 — an EXCHANGE-FORCED liquidation windfall, not a chosen/timed entry; (2) the 2025-09 +383k burst is one @107 short scaled out in four near-identical ~36k-notional / ~25k-pnl tranches on 2025-09-01 (a single position, not repeated edge). real_maj=0 and every top win/loss maj=false — the trader touches NO majors, only illiquid HL native/HIP tokens (@107, @188, PURR/USDC, HYPE), so there is no catalyst-timed precision to hide. size_ratio 14.23 / med_loss_not $105 + n_small 1412 dust closes = thin-book scale-in/partial-skim artifact, not cosmetic loss-shaping.

judge.reasoning: Deception by an edge-holder requires BOTH an unexplained-by-skill edge AND intentional noise to hide it. Neither holds. The edge is fully explained: an exchange-forced ADL windfall plus one scaled-out short on an illiquid token account for the bulk of PnL (top3_share 62%). There is no concealed precision because the trader never touches majors and shows no catalyst-timed accuracy. The surface-level deception signals are benign artifacts: the wr_big/wr_small gap and 14.23 size_ratio with $105 median loss come from taking many tiny partial-profit/dust closes (counted as small low-WR closes) while letting conviction size ride on thin HIP-token books — textbook scale-in/scale-out, not copytrade-disrupting decoy losers. Crucially, a concealing insider would protect a clean equity curve, yet this account authored massive genuine losing streaks (0 wins / 159 losses across 2025-02/03, -80k in 2026-02, multiple all-loss months) with no camouflage payoff. The dormant-burst and deliberate-dip pattern scores are mechanical consequences of one lucky month surrounded by real variance, and B_asymmetric is low. This is a streaky, mediocre-to-poor discretionary illiquid-token trader who caught two good runs and one ADL windfall — regime/luck, not deliberate deception. Score kept low (0.12) per the instruction to discount good-risk-management and sporadic-attention look-alikes.

judge.reasoning: The three flags are explainable as benign artifacts. D_controlled_loss (14.76) rests on a median win/loss notional ratio of 2.63, but that ratio is a side-effect of partial scale-out closes (many small winning legs) — the actual largest losses occur on the largest positions (ETH -26k on ~590k notional, @107 -36k), the opposite of loss-camouflage. wr_big 0.594 vs wr_small 0.383 is the only suggestive number, but 59% is far from the anomalous near-certainty an insider would show, and the catastrophic Jan/Apr months (0 wins, hundreds of losses) prove big/long bets routinely failed in adverse regimes. C_dormant_burst is a single 36-day gap with continued losing afterward, not a catalyst-timed awakening. H_deliberate_dip is just the natural down-month/up-month alternation of a directional trader. Critically, top3_share=0.255 means profit is broad-based (no asymmetric big-hit concealment), flips=0 (no decoy behavior), and the entire fortune lands in one month (May 2025) that maps to a well-known market-wide BTC/ETH rally with 5x-larger sizing — classic trend-following beta capture with poor downside risk control, not concealed insider edge plus deliberate noise. No size-conditional sandbagging, no catalyst precision, no asymmetric concentration coexist. deception_score is low.

refute.refute_reason: 第1判定(deception_score=0.12, trend_following_riskmgmt)は妥当で、欺瞞インサイダー説は良性説で十分に反証できる。インサイダーの核となるシグナルが全て欠如: win_rate 0.392・wr_big 0.478(コイントス並み)でMNPI由来の異常高勝率なし、top3_share 0.199で利益が数発の精密的中に集中せず多発トレードに分散(知っていて一発大張りの真逆)、flips=0、majorsのみ(BTC/ETH/SOL=最深流動性で私的情報が最も活かせない場)。巨額益の正体は機構的: top_wins上位4件は全て2025-10-10の同日Auto-Deleveraging(SUI/SOL/TRUMP/INJ)=暴落カスケード中の取引所強制減らしで、ADLフィルは私的情報で能動的に取れない。2025-10は103勝505敗(勝率17%)で+283k=ショートを大暴落に当てて多数の小スクラッチ損+少数のボラ大勝(レジーム順張り)であり、損小利大の精密インサイダーの逆。D_controlled_loss 14.59は med_win 2427 vs med_loss 971(size_ratio 2.5)=教科書的ロスカット規律で、低勝率が「本物の小損を多数取っている」事実を裏付け欺瞞偽装と矛盾。C_dormant_burst/H_deliberate_dipも、4ヶ月連続実損(-139k)後にタイミング不可知のADL windfallが来た構図で、欺瞞者が予知不能な利益のため4ヶ月-139k出血する合理性なし=散発資金投入+地合便乗で説明可。registry_position/quality/labels全null(台帳未分類)で本プロジェクトの全件debunked結論と整合。残る微疑念は2026-04のavg_not 15252へのサイズ急拡大が776k月直前に起きた点(軽度フロントランでも生じうる)のみだが、majors・sub40%勝率・ADL主導の上位益という全体像から「高ボラ・レジームへのサイズ増し」の良性読みが優越。

real_patterns: scaling_partial_closes_inflate_size_ratio (med_win 3577 vs med_loss 573, size_ratio 6.24, n_big~=n_small ~908 each — classic scale-out trim artifact, not deliberate loss cosmetics)
single_month_concentration (real_all 528k almost entirely June 2026: +480.8k on 399W/74L=84% WR; all other months range -16k..+62k, May was a -16k drawdown right before)
majors_only_edge (real_maj 492k = ~93% of PnL on BTC/ETH/SOL public deep markets; obscure coins @142/HYPE/xyz:URNM/xyz:CL appear mostly as LOSSES — opposite of insider-alt signature)
directional_beta_capture (top wins all BTC 'Close Short' on 2026-06-04 — caught a market drop; trend/regime, not catalyst foreknowledge)
judge.key_evidence: top3_share=0.061 (only 6.1% of profit from top 3 wins) refutes asymmetric few-big-hit camouflage; flips=0 refutes decoy-flip; size_ratio 6.24 with n_big~=n_small (908/907) and burst_share 0.859 concentrated in a single June run (+480.8k, 84% WR) preceded by a losing May (-16k); edge is on public majors (real_maj ~93%), with obscure coins appearing only as losses.
judge.reasoning: The flagged patterns (D_controlled_loss 35.5, high size_ratio, C/H bursts) are individually consistent with deception but collectively fail the disconfirming tests. (1) D/size_ratio: med_win 3577 vs med_loss 573 with nearly equal big/small counts (~908 each) is the textbook signature of scaling out / partial take-profits — winners closed in many clips, losing trims small — not engineered loss cosmetics. (2) The asymmetric-camouflage thesis (B) is directly killed by top3_share=0.061: profit is broad-based across 1815 closes, not a few whales muddying a low WR. (3) flips=0 debunks decoy-flip (F). (4) burst_share=0.859 reflects that essentially the entire lifetime PnL is one month (June 2026, +480.8k at 84% WR), and that month's top wins are all BTC 'Close Short' on 2026-06-04 — capturing a market drop, i.e. directional beta/trend, not catalyst foreknowledge. A deliberate insider-deceiver would not post a -16k May immediately before, nor would their edge sit on the most liquid public majors (real_maj ~93%) where insider info is implausible; notably the only obscure coins (@142, HYPE, xyz:URNM, xyz:CL) appear chiefly as the account's biggest LOSSES, the inverse of an insider-alt pattern. The most parsimonious read is a moderately active majors trader with sound loss-small/let-winners-run discipline who caught one strong directional regime in June. No co-occurrence of an unexplainable edge plus intentional concealing noise, so deception_score is low.

refute.refute_reason: 全4該当根拠が良性説で説明可能。(1)size_ratio6.24はn_big≈n_small(908/907)の対称分割=スケールアウト分割利確の自然な産物で、損小演出(D=35.5)が予測する非対称な「多数の小損+少数の大勝」ではない。med_win3577/med_loss573の差は勝ち玉トレイル+負け玉即断の規律。(2)June集中(burst0.859)はdormant_burst(C=4.9)ではない—233日連続稼働で直前のMayは-16k・Aprは-5kのドローダウン。foreknowledge保持者は事前に-16k食わない。June内も399W/74Lの高頻度でtop3_share0.061=少数巨利なし、地合便乗+サイズ増し。(3)決定的反証:利益の93%(real_maj492k)がBTC/ETH/SOLの最深・最効率公開市場、難解コイン(xyz:URNM/HYPE/xyz:CL)は逆に最大損失=insider-alt署名の真逆。BTCに私的触媒情報は持ち得ない。(4)top勝ち全てが2026-06-04のBTC Close Short=単日マクロ下落のbeta捕捉。しかも3週前5/16のBTCショートは負け(top_losses)=方向観に先見性なし。flips=0でdecoy-flip否定。registry_position/quality/labels全null=台帳・Nansen共に分類/insiderラベルなし。プロジェクト収束結論(2026-06-18 全件debunked)と整合。deception_score0.12は妥当。
